alkylation reagent: Iodoacetamide (40 mM) was then added to alkylate
alkylation concentration: Iodoacetamide (40 mM) was then added to alkylate
cleavage agent: A mixture of trypsin/lysozyme C (2 µg) was added
fractionation method: ultrafiltration followed by size exclusion chromatography (UF-SEC)
fragmentation method: Resolution for HCD spectra was set to 17,500
instrument: coupled in-line with a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: with a nano-electrospray Flex ion source
